parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'DRAFT', kind: 'weekly_lane_brief', lane: $('Prepare lanes + week').item.json.lane, week: $('Prepare lanes + week').item.json.week, markdown: ($json.data && $json.data.markdown) ? $json.data.markdown : $json.markdown }) }}

meta.description: Weekly cron that asks TOWER's /api/ai/brief for each lane's digest and posts the result as a DRAFT for human review. Intelligence proposes; a human disposes.
